Package battleship.view

package battleship.view
Package of the view classes for Battleship. The classes depend on the processing library and controlP5 to create a GUI.

Start the game through the main method in MainAny.

The view decides how to display the game to the user. The view has no direct reference to the model object or modify the model data directly. Instead, it communicates the user input to the controller, which handles this input.

Author:
Seyit A. Duman
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Battleship
    View class of Battleship that contains all methods and variables to show the game.
    CardsG
    CardsG that is sent between players at the beginning of the game.
    ClientServerThread
    This is a thread that can be either a client or a server.
    MainAny
    A processing view for the Battleship.
    PlayedCardE
    PlayedCardE that is sent between players after each move, when on enemyCard played.
    PlayedCardIO
    PlayedCardIO that is sent between players after each move, when on ownCaard played.
